import io
import string

fn process(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut sum = 0
  mut current = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when None
      ()
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
        if in_num
          sum = sum + sign * current
          if first
            out = "#{sum}"
            first = false
          else
            out = "#{out} #{sum}"
          end
          current = 0
          sign = 1
          in_num = false
        end
      else if b == 45
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else if b == 43
        in_num = true
      else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        current = current * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    sum = sum + sign * current
    if first
      out = "#{sum}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{sum}"
    end
  end
  println(out)
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    ()
  when Some(line)
    process(line)
  end
end
